{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))
(def linear-issues (linear_issues))
(def linear-not-done-ids (set (map :id (filter #(not= "done" (:state %)) linear-issues))))

(def matching-prs (filter #(and (:closes_linear %) (contains? linear-not-done-ids (:closes_linear %))) merged-prs))
